# Download Next Steps

Use only the official URLs listed below.

After downloading each source, place it in the destination folder shown for that source.

## Crossroad Mobility Aid Users

- Official URL: https://repository.tugraz.at/records/2gat1-pev27
- Destination folder: `C:\Users\Priyam\Documents\Codex\2026-04-20-navigation-assistance-system-for-differently-abled\data\external\crossroad_mobility`
- Role: Main mobility-aid detection dataset
- Access method: Public repository download
- License / terms note: CC BY-SA 4.0
- Practical note: Use as the primary source for wheelchair, walker, crutch, and cane user boxes.

## PMMA

- Official URL: https://github.com/DatasetPMMA/PMMA
- Destination folder: `C:\Users\Priyam\Documents\Codex\2026-04-20-navigation-assistance-system-for-differently-abled\data\external\pmma`
- Role: Mobility-aid video dataset for temporal behavior and clip evaluation
- Access method: Official GitHub repo plus linked data assets
- License / terms note: Verify the official PMMA data terms before redistribution
- Practical note: Use for clip-based review, video sequences, and mobility-aid temporal behavior.

## CrowdHuman

- Official URL: https://www.crowdhuman.org/
- Destination folder: `C:\Users\Priyam\Documents\Codex\2026-04-20-navigation-assistance-system-for-differently-abled\data\external\crowdhuman`
- Role: Crowded person detection and occlusion robustness
- Access method: Official public website
- License / terms note: Official site states non-commercial research / educational usage
- Practical note: Use only for the person class, not mobility-aid classes.

## MOT17

- Official URL: https://motchallenge.net/data/MOT17/
- Destination folder: `C:\Users\Priyam\Documents\Codex\2026-04-20-navigation-assistance-system-for-differently-abled\data\external\mot17`
- Role: Tracker tuning and held-out evaluation
- Access method: Official benchmark download
- License / terms note: Follow MOTChallenge terms and citation requirements
- Practical note: Keep whole sequences intact; never split individual frames across splits.

## Market-1501

- Official URL: https://zheng-lab-anu.github.io/Project/project_reid.html
- Destination folder: `C:\Users\Priyam\Documents\Codex\2026-04-20-navigation-assistance-system-for-differently-abled\data\external\market1501`
- Role: ReID pretraining
- Access method: Official project page
- License / terms note: Follow the official dataset terms and citation guidance
- Practical note: Use unchanged for ReID pretraining, with only metadata files added if needed.
